_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PELICAN PANEL - PTERODACTYL_v2
name: Ollama + Open WebUI
author: awakenthejaken@github
description: Runs the Ollama LLM inference engine alongside the Open WebUI chat interface in a single container. Access the chat UI on the server's allocated port. GPU passthrough is supported when the host has NVIDIA drivers and the NVIDIA Container Toolkit installed.

variables.name: Web UI Port
variables.description: The port Open WebUI listens on. Must match the port allocated to this server in the Pelican panel.

variables.name: Ollama Model
variables.description: The Ollama model to pull automatically on first start (e.g. llama3.2, mistral, gemma3). Leave empty to skip auto-pull.

variables.name: Open WebUI Secret Key
variables.description: Secret key used by Open WebUI for session signing. Change this to a strong random string before exposing the UI publicly.

variables.name: Ollama Host Binding
variables.description: Address and port Ollama listens on inside the container. Defaults to all interfaces on port 11434.
